svg.title: Amazon Q Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: Step-by-step flow showing how a user query travels through Amazon Q to produce a final answer, including IAM security, knowledge sources, and response generation.

g.text: Asks a question in natural language

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does Amazon Q handle security?')
sendPrompt('What does the Amazon Q engine do?')
g.text: Understands intent · plans retrieval · calls LLM

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What documents can Amazon Q connect to?')
sendPrompt('Which SaaS tools does Amazon Q integrate with?')
sendPrompt('What databases does Amazon Q read?')
sendPrompt('Can Amazon Q read code repositories?')
sendPrompt('How does Amazon Q generate its final answer?')
g.text: Synthesises retrieved content into an answer

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the user get from Amazon Q?')
